mechanism: The non-linear term premium response to fiscal supply is the activation mechanism for the doom loop. Below ~3-4% structural deficit, term premium is insensitive and the loop is dormant. Above threshold, each increment of deficit drives disproportionate term premium increase.
regime_dependence: The activation threshold depends on reserve currency status, foreign demand for Treasuries, and central bank balance sheet policy. QE suppresses the loop; QT re-activates it.
